# agentreadability

Full-word alias for [`a14y`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/a14y). Installing this package gives you the same CLI under the `agentreadability` command name.

> 📖 **Full documentation & source:** <https://github.com/timothyjordan/a14y>
> 🌐 **Docs site:** <https://a14y.dev>

```bash
npx agentreadability https://example.com
```

Everything the `a14y` CLI does, `agentreadability` does — same binary, same flags. For full documentation and the command reference, see the [a14y package on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/a14y) or the [project README on GitHub](https://github.com/timothyjordan/a14y).
